stemHtml: A jet transport aeroplane at cruise altitude of FL370 suffers a loss of cabin pressurisation without structural damage, the crew should initially descent at...

options.a: V<sub>MO</sub> and airbrakes and or flaps may be extended to increase the rate of descent of necessary.
options.b: M<sub>MO</sub> (Maximum Operating Mach Number) and airbrakes can be extended to increase the rate of descent.
options.c: 1.32 V<sub>MD</sub> and airbrakes and or flaps may be extended to increase the rate of descent, if necessary.
options.d: the speed for l-d max and airbrakes and or flaps may be extended to increase the rate of descent if necessary.
